description: Remove the 32pt bottom status bar entirely and relocate its only tenant — the Jump-to-Latest-Unread button — into the sidebar footer next to the help (?) button as a compact bell icon with badge. Supersedes the chrome-strip approach from CMUX-36: the sidebar footer is where operator-facing utility buttons already live, and consolidating there reclaims 32pt of vertical space for the terminal. Icon-only (no text label), keep the unread-count badge, keep the disabled-when-zero state, keep the AppDelegate.jumpToLatestUnread() wiring. Tooltip + accessibilityLabel carry the localized description now that the label is gone.

relationships_out.note: Removes the bottom status bar that CMUX-36 introduced; consolidates its only tenant into the sidebar footer.

title: Remove bottom status bar; move Jump-to-Latest-Unread into sidebar footer
